## Checklist

- [ ] Technique renders correctly with `hugo server --buildDrafts`
- [ ] Frontmatter is complete (name, packageManager, slug, category, severity, platform, description)
- [ ] At least one attack scenario with working code examples
- [ ] Code blocks have correct `language` hints (bash, python, json, etc.)
- [ ] Severity level is justified
- [ ] Detection/mitigation sections are included
- [ ] No broken links in references
